name: Crumb Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, measure, and sift.
2. Cream sugar and shortening together.
3. Add flour, cinnamon, and salt to the mixture. Mix until crumbly.
4. Reserve half of this mixture for the top of the cake.
5. Combine the remaining mixture with sour cream and raisins. Beat thoroughly.
6. Add baking powder and baking soda.
7. Pour into a well-oiled loaf pan. Sprinkle with the reserved crumbs.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 40 minutes.
